notes:
PASS. All CRITICAL and HIGH checks clean.

--- CRITICAL checks ---

SCOPE (PASS): git diff HEAD --stat shows six scene files dirty, but the five others (CopperMineScene, GarageScene, LocalSceneBase, NeighborhoodScene, OverworldScene) are pre-existing dirty files from prior sessions. CopperMineScene.js diff is a saveGame + QUESTS import — no terrain rendering code. Worker correctly restricted edits to WorldMapScene.js only.

EDIT ZONES (PASS): Lines 13-46 contain the BIOME import from regions.js, the BIOME_COLORS palette constant, the WORLD_REGION_BIOME bridge map, and biomeForWorldRegion() helper — exactly as claimed in the receipt. Lines 75-86 contain the _renderTerrainLayer({...}) invocation in create() after the parchment rectangle. Lines 219-289 contain the full _renderTerrainLayer method body. All three zones match the worker's stated ranges.

RENDER ONCE (PASS): _renderTerrainLayer is called only from create() (line 80). No update() method exists in the file. Zero per-frame work.

PALETTE (PASS): All seven BIOME_COLORS entries match the spec hex values exactly — DESERT 0xf0d18a, GRASSLAND 0x4f7a52, WATER 0x2b5f91, ROCK 0x7a6a5a, MOUNTAIN 0x5a5560, URBAN 0xb8a07a, UNKNOWN 0x1a1a2e. No deviation.

CLICK HANDLERS (PASS): setInteractive, pointerdown, pointerover, pointerout all confirmed present at their expected locations (lines 123, 164, 167, 170, 175-176, 196, 198-200). The terrain graphics object in _renderTerrainLayer never receives setInteractive. Input routing to node circles is byte-identical to pre-edit behavior.

STANDARDS (PASS): JavaScript only — no TypeScript. No new top-level dependencies added; Phaser Graphics used via existing this.add.graphics(). No changes to node placement, scene transitions, or unlock logic. Pre-existing audio block (lines 212-216) preserved verbatim and correctly attributed to prior session in worker notes.

--- HIGH checks ---

RECEIPT ACCURACY (PASS): files_changed lists only WorldMapScene.js — correct. exports_added is empty — correct (all additions are module-scope constants and a method; no new exports). Layer-order verification, click-handler confirmation, overlap notes, and pre-existing dirty-block acknowledgment all present in worker notes as required by agent spec.

--- MEDIUM / LOW observations (non-blocking) ---

GEOMETRY MASK (LOW, informational): The mask graphics object is created with add:false, which is correct Phaser practice. The mask itself is not added to the container — this is intentional since GeometryMask applies to the graphics object, not the container. Pattern is sound.

OVERLAP NOTE (LOW, acknowledged): Worker correctly flags that all three current locations sit in arizona_desert and blobs will heavily overlap. Noted as intentional for the Sonoran-only data set; flagged for future tuning when non-Sonoran locations land. No action needed now.
